final:
module gradient_descent (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [15:0] current_value,
    input wire [15:0] learning_rate,
    input wire [15:0] gradient,
    output reg [15:0] updated_value
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        updated_value <= 16'b0;
    end else begin
        updated_value <= current_value - (learning_rate * gradient);
    end
end

endmodule
